'''âth-b-t''' ('''kathabat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coerce|coerce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coerce|coerce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kathabat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithabat|thithabat]] || [[word:jithabat|jithabat]] || [[word:shithabat|shithabat]] || [[word:kithabat|kithabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthabat|thuthuthabat]] || [[word:jujuthabat|jujuthabat]] || [[word:shushuthabat|shushuthabat]] || [[word:kukuthabat|kukuthabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthabat|thuthabat]] || [[word:juthabat|juthabat]] || [[word:shuthabat|shuthabat]] || [[word:kuthabat|kuthabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthabat|thuthabat]] || [[word:juthabat|juthabat]] || [[word:shuthabat|shuthabat]] || [[word:kuthabat|kuthabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethabat|thethabat]] || [[word:jethabat|jethabat]] || [[word:shethabat|shethabat]] || [[word:kethabat|kethabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothabat|thothothabat]] || [[word:jojothabat|jojothabat]] || [[word:shoshothabat|shoshothabat]] || [[word:kokothabat|kokothabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothabat|thothabat]] || [[word:jothabat|jothabat]] || [[word:shothabat|shothabat]] || [[word:kothabat|kothabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothabat|thothabat]] || [[word:jothabat|jothabat]] || [[word:shothabat|shothabat]] || [[word:kothabat|kothabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthabat|thĂŠthabat]] || [[word:jĂŠthabat|jĂŠthabat]] || [[word:shĂŠthabat|shĂŠthabat]] || [[word:kĂŠthabat|kĂŠthabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathabat|thathathabat]] || [[word:jajathabat|jajathabat]] || [[word:shashathabat|shashathabat]] || [[word:kakathabat|kakathabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathabat|thathabat]] || [[word:jathabat|jathabat]] || [[word:shathabat|shathabat]] || [[word:kathabat|kathabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathabat|thathabat]] || [[word:jathabat|jathabat]] || [[word:shathabat|shathabat]] || [[word:kathabat|kathabat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathabat|shathabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathabat|goshathabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathabat|gokishathabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathabatnĂŒ|shathabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathabatnknĂŒ|goshathabatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabatnĂŒ|gokishathabatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathabatshĂ«|shathabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathabatnkshĂ«|goshathabatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathabatshĂ«|gokishathabatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabatro|shathabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabatnkro|goshathabatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabatro|gokishathabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabatmu|shathabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabatnkmu|goshathabatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabatmu|gokishathabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathabatsher|shathabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathabatnksher|goshathabatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathabatsher|gokishathabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathabatng|shathabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathabatnkng|goshathabatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathabatng|gokishathabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathabatya|shathabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathabatnkya|goshathabatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathabatya|gokishathabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathabatyam|shathabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathabatnkyam|goshathabatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathabatyam|gokishathabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabatnĂŒshĂ«|shathabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathabatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathabatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabatnĂŒro|shathabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabatnknĂŒro|goshathabatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabatnĂŒro|gokishathabatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabatnĂŒmu|shathabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabatnknĂŒmu|goshathabatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabatnĂŒmu|gokishathabatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabatshĂ«nĂŒ|shathabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathabatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathabatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabatshĂ«ro|shathabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabatnkshĂ«ro|goshathabatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabatshĂ«ro|gokishathabatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabatshĂ«mu|shathabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabatnkshĂ«mu|goshathabatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabatshĂ«mu|gokishathabatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabatronĂŒ|shathabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabatnkronĂŒ|goshathabatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabatronĂŒ|gokishathabatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabatroshĂ«|shathabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabatnkroshĂ«|goshathabatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabatroshĂ«|gokishathabatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathabatromu|shathabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathabatnkromu|goshathabatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathabatromu|gokishathabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathabatmunĂŒ|shathabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathabatnkmunĂŒ|goshathabatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathabatmunĂŒ|gokishathabatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathabatmushĂ«|shathabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathabatnkmushĂ«|goshathabatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathabatmushĂ«|gokishathabatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathabatmuro|shathabatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathabatnkmuro|goshathabatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathabatmuro|gokishathabatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
